warm_up:
Warm-up
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

strength.name: Snatch Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | E2MOM 8min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 RFT
5 Hang Power Snatch
5 Overhead Squats
10 burpees over bar
Rest 1.5 mins
@60/40
pick a weight you can go unbroken otherwise scale
50/35 or 40/30
Earn your rest and push the burpee pace

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, legs, and pressing muscles; accessory work addresses posterior chain and arm balance.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Snatch Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Snatch, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 5 Hang Power Snatch, 5 Overhead Squats, 10 burpees over bar, pick a weight you can go unbroken otherwise scale, 50/35 or 40/30. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), biceps, core stability.
